data.title: OpenAI plans $850B expansion, needing energy of 17 nuclear plants or 9 Hoover Dams. Supports 13M homes, CEO says.
data.description: OpenAI is planning a colossal $850 billion expansion to build data centers that will consume energy equivalent to 17 nuclear facilities to meet the soaring demand for AI tools. CEO Sam Altman considers the scale and pace ambitious but potentially too slow due to the rapid growth of AI adoption. Altman shared with CNBC the extensive infrastructure plan, which rivals the energy output of nine Hoover Dams and can power more than 13 million American households. The project also includes partnerships. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Expedition Infrastructure Partners and The Gordian Group form alliance combining $20+ billion in renewable transactions with 35 years of restructuring expertise.
data.description: A significant partnership has been formed between Expedition Infrastructure Partners (XIP) and Gordian Group, bringing together over $20 billion in renewable transactions along with 35 years of restructuring expertise. This collaboration aims to offer comprehensive restructuring and advisory services. This strategic move, announced in New York on September 25, 2025, reflects a strong commitment to enhancing opportunities in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Aya Gold & Silver (TSX: AYA; OTCQX: AYASF) rejects false claims in short-seller report.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in Montreal, Aya Gold & Silver Inc. (TSX: AYA; OTCQX: AYASF) dismissed false allegations in a short-seller report. The corporation vehemently denies the misleading information presented.

data.title: Ranger Chocolate Co. wins 3 awards at 2025 Americas Bean-to-Bar & Craft Chocolatier Competition. Gold for Salted Caramel.
data.description: In Portland, Oregon on September 25, 2025, Ranger Chocolate Co. celebrated their success at the 2025 Americas Bean-to-Bar & Craft Chocolatier Competition, hosted by the International Chocolate Awards. Among the accolades were three notable wins. Their Salted Caramel variety secured a Gold Medal and was named Best in Category for the Enrobed division.

data.title: U.S. Steel pleased with ITC decision imposing duties on $2.85 billion of CORE steel imports from 10 countries.
data.description: PITTSBURGH--American steel manufacturer U. S. Steel has expressed approval for the latest ruling by the U.S. International Trade Commission (ITC). The commission unanimously voted 3-0 to enforce antidumping and countervailing duty (AD/CVD) measures on imports of corrosion-resistant steel products (CORE) from ten countries. These countries include Australia, Brazil, Canada, Mexico, the Netherlands, South Africa, Taiwan, Turkey, United Arab Emirates, and Vietnam. The ITC determined that the CORE imports from these nations, valued at $2.85 billion, were unfairly traded.

data.title: Clean Harbors prices $745 million senior notes due 2033 with 5.750% interest rate. Aggregate decreased from $845 million.
data.description: Norwell, Massachusetts - Clean Harbors, Inc. has disclosed the pricing for its private offering, announcing the issuance of $745 million worth of senior notes due 2033. This offering comes alongside a $100 million boost in the new secured term loan credit facility. The initial aggregate principal amount of the notes was lowered from an initial $845 million. These notes, bearing an interest rate of 5.750%, were successfully priced.

data.title: Utility Trailer partners with Western Trailer Repair in Seattle for parts and services; 10 service bays, 12 technicians.
data.description: In CITY OF INDUSTRY, Calif., Utility Trailer Manufacturing Company, LLC has welcomed Western Trailer Repair to its dealer network in Seattle, Washington. The company, led by Mark and Jeff Terrana, is located near I-5 and offers parts and services. With 10 service bays and 12 skilled technicians, they are known for their expertise. Western Trailer Repair is a trusted dealer for Aurora Trailer Parts, providing convenience and quality service to customers in Seattle.

data.title: Brothers charged in $8M crypto kidnapping of Minnesota family; held them at gunpoint for 9 hours to transfer funds.
data.description: Two siblings took their family hostage for a duration of nine hours, coercing the father to transfer cryptocurrency to their digital wallets at gunpoint.

data.title: Heritage Financial Corp to acquire Olympic Bancorp Inc for strategic expansion in the Puget Sound Region. Nasdaq: HFWA.
data.description: Heritage Bank, under Heritage Financial Corporation, has announced a strategic expansion in the Puget Sound Region through a partnership with Olympic Bancorp, Inc. This move, revealed on September 25, 2025, involves the acquisition of Olympic to further bolster Heritage Bank's presence. Heritage Financial Corporation, listed as Nasdaq: HFWA, will leverage this collaboration to enhance its market reach and services in Olympia and Port Orchard, Washington. This development signifies a notable growth opportunity for Heritage Bank, with specific implications for its operations and footprint in the Puget Sound Region.

data.title: New Jersey Therapy & Life Coaching begins "Four Paws, Big Hearts" fundraiser for Canine Companions, aiming to raise $50,000.
data.description: Voorhees, New Jersey - On September 25, 2025, New Jersey Therapy & Life Coaching announced the commencement of their fundraising campaign "Four Paws, Big Hearts" for Canine Companions®. The objective of this initiative is to collect $50,000 to aid the crucial efforts of service dogs and the people they help.

data.title: unWired Broadband opens NextGen Fiber network in Wasco, CA with ribbon-cutting ceremony attended by officials.
data.description: In Wasco, California, unWired Broadband, a leading high-speed Internet provider, launched their NextGen Fiber network with a ribbon-cutting event on September 25. The ceremony was graced by executives from unWired Broadband, along with contractor partners from Crown Communications Engineering, and city officials from Wasco, Kern County Board of Supervisors, Congressman David Valadao's office, and CA Assemblywoman Jasmeen. This initiative marks a significant milestone for the community, facilitating enhanced connectivity.

data.title: AAVE price may reach $299 target with bullish reversal signals, as technical analysis points to oversold conditions.
data.description: The AAVE price is expected to potentially rebound to $299 in the short term despite the ongoing bearish trend. Technical analysis indicates that oversold conditions could lead to a bounce in the near future.
